markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the content strategy for the new AI agent initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize content for existing agents (Phase 1) to build a solid process before tackling custom, "spin-up" agents (Phase 2).](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**Content Structure:** Guides will be TOFU (high-level educational), while PSEO pages will be BOFU (specific use cases tied to agents).](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Content Recycling:** Refresh existing blog posts as new guides to preserve SEO history and avoid content cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**PSEO Strategy:** Liz and Talal will research PSEO page templates, as the "best agent for X" concept is problematic for a platform where users create their own ideal agents.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

## Topics

### Agent Strategy: Existing vs. Custom

  - [**Problem:** A strategic disconnect exists between Liz's one-pager (focusing on existing agents) and Marcel's vision of custom, "spin-up" agents.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Solution:** Adopt a phased approach to build a stable process before expanding.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Focus on content for the existing suite of agents.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Tackle custom, spin-up agents later, likely led by Nico.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

### Content Structure: Guides vs. PSEO

  - [**Problem:** The new content architecture risks cannibalizing keywords and creating user confusion with existing blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Solution:** Define clear roles for new content types.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Guides (TOFU):** High-level educational content (e.g., "What is an RFI in Construction?").](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
          - [Minimal agent promotion → simple CTAs only.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**PSEO Pages (BOFU):** Specific use cases tied to agents (e.g., "How to Use the RFI Agent to Screen Submittals").](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
          - [Detailed agent functionality and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [**Decision:** Refresh existing blog posts as new guides to preserve SEO history and avoid creating duplicate content.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Content Generation: Top-Down vs. Bottom-Up

  - [**Problem:** The best method for generating a comprehensive list of specific use cases is unclear.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [**Two Approaches:**](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Top-Down (Persona-Based):**](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
          - [Start with industry personas and their jobs-to-be-done.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
          - [Generate seed keywords → manual research → shoehorn in agents.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
          - [*[Likely to produce more general guide topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)*](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Bottom-Up (Agent-Based):**](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
          - [Start with an agent and list all its capabilities per industry.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
          - [*[Likely to produce more specific PSEO use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)*](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Decision:** Test the bottom-up approach on two agents to evaluate its effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### PSEO Page Templates

  - [**Problem:** The "best agent for X" PSEO concept is flawed because users create their own ideal agents on the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [**Decision:** Liz and Talal will research effective PSEO page templates for this unique product.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

### Newsletter Status

  - [**Problem:** The newsletter's value is unclear, as the January edition was not sent and the client's goals are undefined.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [**Context:** The newsletter is a low-lift task (\~0.5 days/month) for an audience of existing customers and trade show contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Decision:** Liz will include the newsletter in the SOW and use the contract discussion to get a clear direction from the client.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathan:**](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Test the "bottom-up" content generation approach on two agents to define the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Draft a template for PSEO use case pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Update the one-pager with SOW language reflecting the phased agent strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Research PSEO page templates with Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [Use the contract discussion to get a clear direction on the newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/xv3FvGQ1fckD9YrnQxBzsnDGAAhKCHqm?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
